title: [This issue is invalid] JSON type does not support NaN / Infinity
description:
### Company or project name
### Describe the unexpected behaviour
@Avogar
```
CREATE TABLE users (j JSON) ENGINE=Memory;
INSERT INTO users format JSONAsObject
{"f":1.1}
{"f": null}
select * from users;
+-j---------+
1. | {"f":1.1} |
2. | {}        |
+-----------+
INSERT INTO users format JSONAsObject
{"f":NaN}
{"f":Infinity}
{"f":-Infinity}
Error on processing query: Code: 117. DB::Exception: Cannot parse JSON object here: {"f":NaN}: (at row 1)
```
https://fiddle.clickhouse.com/0db38176-9589-4fcb-a8f0-8599c13dc901
### Which ClickHouse versions are affected?
all
### How to reproduce
above
### Expected behavior
_No response_
### Error message and/or stacktrace
_No response_
### Additional context
_No response_
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER, j TEXT);
key_bug_features: Inserting NaN or Infinity into JSON type
